---
description: "Use when writing or editing code and docs to keep comments, docstrings, and developer/user text in English while preserving public APIs and machine-readable identifiers."
name: "English Language Standard"
applyTo:
  [
    "**/*.py",
    "**/*.md",
    "**/*.js",
    "**/*.ts",
    "**/*.json",
    "**/*.yml",
    "**/*.yaml",
    "**/*.sh",
  ]
---

# English Language Standard

- Write new comments, docstrings, and documentation in English.
- Keep user-facing and log text in English unless a task explicitly requests another language.
- Preserve existing public APIs, config keys, schema fields, and machine-readable identifiers.
- When translating legacy text, keep domain meaning intact and avoid behavior changes.
- If a source phrase is ambiguous, note the ambiguity and suggest concise alternatives.
